name: Tuberosa Phase 9 — knowledge-safety FP/FN fixture
description: Measures precision / recall / F1 of src/security/knowledge-safety.ts secret patterns. True positives must redact; true negatives must NOT redact. Cases are atomic — one secret pattern per case — so per-pattern metrics roll up cleanly. The expectedPattern matches the `name` field exported on each TextPattern in knowledge-safety.ts.
